author: Ryan Estes
name: LocalGlobal_SwiGLU_SeqPack_MixedQuant
blurb: Transformer language model using depth-scheduled local/global attention, SwiGLU feedforward blocks, randomized sequence packing, and selective mixed-bit quantization. Trained on the SP-1536 FineWeb10B tokenizer variant and evaluated using the final mixed-quantized roundtrip artifact under the 16MB submission limit.
